zh-CN.label: 人际密度：低
zh-CN.fit_signal: 互动频率低时：这种环境通常给你更多安静推进和独立消化的空间。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 互动频率低的主要消耗点：风险不是人太多，而是情绪线索太少，可能让关系修复和反馈节奏变得迟钝。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的互动频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的互动频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察互动频率是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果互动频率被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认互动节奏：哪些沟通必须即时回应，哪些可以异步处理。

en.label: Interpersonal density: low
en.meaning: fewer live interactions and more independent work
en.fit_signal: When interaction load is low: This setting usually gives you more quiet execution time and room to process alone. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at low interaction load: The risk is not too much people-contact; it is too little emotional signal, which can make repair and feedback rhythms slower. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of interaction load does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of interaction load does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether interaction load is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If interaction load is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask the manager which conversations need immediate response and which can be handled asynchronously.

zh-CN.label: 人际密度：中
zh-CN.meaning: 有固定协作节奏，也有独立空间
zh-CN.fit_signal: 互动频率中时：这种环境有足够互动来使用你的关系优势，也保留一定独立节奏。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 互动频率中的主要消耗点：风险在于边界模糊：有些沟通值得投入，有些只是消耗。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的互动频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的互动频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察互动频率是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果互动频率被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认互动节奏：哪些沟通必须即时回应，哪些可以异步处理。

en.label: Interpersonal density: medium
en.meaning: a mix of scheduled collaboration and independent focus
en.fit_signal: When interaction load is medium: This setting gives you enough interaction to use relational strengths while still leaving some independent rhythm. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at medium interaction load: The risk is blurred boundaries: some conversations deserve investment, while others only drain attention. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of interaction load does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of interaction load does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether interaction load is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If interaction load is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask the manager which conversations need immediate response and which can be handled asynchronously.

zh-CN.label: 人际密度：高
zh-CN.meaning: 频繁沟通、同步和临场回应
zh-CN.fit_signal: 互动频率高时：这种环境会频繁调用你的共情、调节和关系判断。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 互动频率高的主要消耗点：如果恢复机制不足，你可能很快从“能回应”变成“被持续拉扯”。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的互动频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的互动频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察互动频率是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果互动频率被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认互动节奏：哪些沟通必须即时回应，哪些可以异步处理。

en.label: Interpersonal density: high
en.meaning: frequent communication, coordination, and real-time response
en.fit_signal: When interaction load is high: This setting will call on empathy, regulation, and relationship judgment often. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at high interaction load: If recovery is weak, you may shift quickly from being responsive to feeling continuously pulled in. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of interaction load does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of interaction load does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether interaction load is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If interaction load is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask the manager which conversations need immediate response and which can be handled asynchronously.

zh-CN.label: 情绪劳动：低
zh-CN.meaning: 主要处理任务，不常承接他人情绪
zh-CN.fit_signal: 情绪承接低时：这种环境通常给你更多安静推进和独立消化的空间。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 情绪承接低的主要消耗点：风险不是人太多，而是情绪线索太少，可能让关系修复和反馈节奏变得迟钝。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的情绪承接通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的情绪承接通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察情绪承接是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果情绪承接被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认情绪承接边界：投诉、冲突或他人压力是否有制度化分流。

en.label: Emotional labor: low
en.meaning: mostly task-focused with limited emotional load from others
en.fit_signal: When emotional labor is low: This setting usually gives you more quiet execution time and room to process alone. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at low emotional labor: The risk is not too much people-contact; it is too little emotional signal, which can make repair and feedback rhythms slower. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of emotional labor does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of emotional labor does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether emotional labor is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If emotional labor is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask how the team routes complaints, conflict, or other people’s stress instead of letting one responsive person absorb it.

zh-CN.label: 情绪劳动：中

zh-CN.fit_signal: 情绪承接中时：这种环境有足够互动来使用你的关系优势，也保留一定独立节奏。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。

观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。

zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认情绪承接边界：投诉、冲突或他人压力是否有制度化分流。

en.label: Conflict frequency: low
en.meaning: clear norms and relatively few disagreements
en.fit_signal: When conflict exposure is low: This setting usually gives you more quiet execution time and room to process alone. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.

zh-CN.label: 冲突频率：中

zh-CN.fit_signal: 分歧频率中时：这种环境有足够互动来使用你的关系优势，也保留一定独立节奏。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 分歧频率中的主要消耗点：风险在于边界模糊：有些沟通值得投入，有些只是消耗。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的分歧频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的分歧频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察分歧频率是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果分歧频率被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认分歧处理方式：争议是靠流程、角色权限，还是靠个人关系缓冲。

en.label: Conflict frequency: medium
en.meaning: periodic disagreement requiring negotiation and review
en.fit_signal: When conflict exposure is medium: This setting gives you enough interaction to use relational strengths while still leaving some independent rhythm. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at medium conflict exposure: The risk is blurred boundaries: some conversations deserve investment, while others only drain attention. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of conflict exposure does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of conflict exposure does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether conflict exposure is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If conflict exposure is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask whether disagreement is handled through process, role authority, or informal relationship repair.

zh-CN.label: 冲突频率：高
zh-CN.meaning: 经常有投诉、博弈、优先级冲突或强反馈
zh-CN.fit_signal: 分歧频率高时：这种环境会频繁调用你的共情、调节和关系判断。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 分歧频率高的主要消耗点：如果恢复机制不足，你可能很快从“能回应”变成“被持续拉扯”。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的分歧频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的分歧频率通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察分歧频率是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果分歧频率被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认分歧处理方式：争议是靠流程、角色权限，还是靠个人关系缓冲。

en.label: Conflict frequency: high
en.meaning: frequent complaints, tradeoffs, priority conflicts, or strong feedback
en.fit_signal: When conflict exposure is high: This setting will call on empathy, regulation, and relationship judgment often. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at high conflict exposure: If recovery is weak, you may shift quickly from being responsive to feeling continuously pulled in. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of conflict exposure does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of conflict exposure does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether conflict exposure is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If conflict exposure is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask whether disagreement is handled through process, role authority, or informal relationship repair.

zh-CN.label: 反馈强度：低
zh-CN.meaning: 反馈周期长，评价少且较私下
zh-CN.fit_signal: 反馈强度低时：这种环境通常给你更多安静推进和独立消化的空间。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 反馈强度低的主要消耗点：风险不是人太多，而是情绪线索太少，可能让关系修复和反馈节奏变得迟钝。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的反馈强度通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的反馈强度通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察反馈强度是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。

zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认反馈规则：频率、公开程度、修改轮次和最终拍板人。

en.label: Feedback intensity: low
en.meaning: infrequent feedback, usually private and spaced out
en.fit_signal: When feedback load is low: This setting usually gives you more quiet execution time and room to process alone. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at low feedback load: The risk is not too much people-contact; it is too little emotional signal, which can make repair and feedback rhythms slower. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of feedback load does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of feedback load does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether feedback load is predictable or spikes without warning.

Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If feedback load is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask about feedback frequency, public visibility, revision loops, and who makes the final call.

zh-CN.fit_signal: 自主恢复空间高时：这种环境会频繁调用你的共情、调节和关系判断。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 自主恢复空间高的主要消耗点：如果恢复机制不足，你可能很快从“能回应”变成“被持续拉扯”。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的自主恢复空间通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的自主恢复空间通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察自主恢复空间是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果自主恢复空间被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认恢复空间：高压任务后是否允许安静复盘、调节节奏或切换任务。

en.label: Autonomy and recovery space: high
en.meaning: meaningful control over focus, review, and recovery rhythm
en.fit_signal: When recovery autonomy is high: This setting will call on empathy, regulation, and relationship judgment often. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at high recovery autonomy: If recovery is weak, you may shift quickly from being responsive to feeling continuously pulled in. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of recovery autonomy does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of recovery autonomy does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether recovery autonomy is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If recovery autonomy is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask whether high-pressure work is followed by quiet review time, pace control, or task switching.

zh-CN.label: 协作复杂度：低
zh-CN.meaning: 少数人协作，责任边界清楚
zh-CN.fit_signal: 协作复杂度低时：这种环境通常给你更多安静推进和独立消化的空间。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 协作复杂度低的主要消耗点：风险不是人太多，而是情绪线索太少，可能让关系修复和反馈节奏变得迟钝。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的协作复杂度通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的协作复杂度通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察协作复杂度是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果协作复杂度被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认协作复杂度：你需要同时维护多少利益相关方、隐性期待和跨团队关系。

en.label: Collaboration complexity: low
en.meaning: small group coordination with clear responsibility lines
en.fit_signal: When coordination complexity is low: This setting usually gives you more quiet execution time and room to process alone. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at low coordination complexity: The risk is not too much people-contact; it is too little emotional signal, which can make repair and feedback rhythms slower. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of coordination complexity does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of coordination complexity does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether coordination complexity is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If coordination complexity is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask how many stakeholders, hidden expectations, and cross-team relationships the role must hold at once.

zh-CN.label: 协作复杂度：中
zh-CN.meaning: 跨角色协作，需要持续对齐
zh-CN.fit_signal: 协作复杂度中时：这种环境有足够互动来使用你的关系优势，也保留一定独立节奏。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 协作复杂度中的主要消耗点：风险在于边界模糊：有些沟通值得投入，有些只是消耗。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的协作复杂度通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的协作复杂度通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察协作复杂度是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果协作复杂度被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认协作复杂度：你需要同时维护多少利益相关方、隐性期待和跨团队关系。

en.label: Collaboration complexity: medium
en.meaning: cross-role work that needs steady alignment
en.fit_signal: When coordination complexity is medium: This setting gives you enough interaction to use relational strengths while still leaving some independent rhythm. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at medium coordination complexity: The risk is blurred boundaries: some conversations deserve investment, while others only drain attention. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of coordination complexity does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of coordination complexity does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether coordination complexity is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If coordination complexity is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
en.manager_note: Ask how many stakeholders, hidden expectations, and cross-team relationships the role must hold at once.

zh-CN.label: 协作复杂度：高
zh-CN.meaning: 多方利益、模糊责任和频繁协调同时存在
zh-CN.fit_signal: 协作复杂度高时：这种环境会频繁调用你的共情、调节和关系判断。 对 EQ 报告来说，重点是观察它是否让你的优势自然发挥，而不是逼你长期扮演协调者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 协作复杂度高的主要消耗点：如果恢复机制不足，你可能很快从“能回应”变成“被持续拉扯”。 如果你的发展杠杆正好落在 ER/RM，这个变量要优先验证。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个岗位里的协作复杂度通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是具体职业推荐，只是帮助你观察环境变量。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个岗位里的协作复杂度通常处在什么水平？遇到压力、反馈或分歧时，团队默认由谁来承接和收尾？
role_observation_checklist: 观察协作复杂度是稳定可预期，还是经常突然升高。
观察情绪性沟通是否有明确负责人，而不是默认落到最愿意回应的人身上。
观察你在一天结束后是更清楚、更有能量，还是持续反刍和耗竭。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果协作复杂度被低估，团队可能把隐形沟通成本当成“性格好的人自然会做”。
zh-CN.safe_experiment: 先用一周观察互动节奏和恢复空间，不要仅凭岗位名称判断适配。
zh-CN.manager_note: 和管理者确认协作复杂度：你需要同时维护多少利益相关方、隐性期待和跨团队关系。

en.label: Collaboration complexity: high
en.meaning: multiple stakeholders, fuzzy ownership, and frequent coordination at once
en.fit_signal: When coordination complexity is high: This setting will call on empathy, regulation, and relationship judgment often. For this EQ report, the question is whether the setting lets your strengths operate naturally instead of making you the default emotional coordinator.
en.strain_signal: The strain point at high coordination complexity: If recovery is weak, you may shift quickly from being responsive to feeling continuously pulled in. If your development lever sits in ER or RM, verify this variable early.
en.what_to_verify: What level of coordination complexity does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
en.do_not_overread: This is not an occupation recommendation. It is a lens for reading the work environment.
en.interview_question: What level of coordination complexity does this role actually carry, and who owns the follow-through after pressure, feedback, or disagreement?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether coordination complexity is predictable or spikes without warning.
Notice whether emotional coordination has a clear owner or falls to the most responsive person.
Notice whether you end the day clearer and steadier, or still replaying conversations.
en.team_risk: If coordination complexity is underestimated, the team may treat invisible coordination as something emotionally capable people will simply absorb.
en.safe_experiment: Observe rhythm and recovery space for one week before judging fit from a job title.
